name: io.github.Alisammour/storyflo-mcp
title: Storyflo
description: Storyflo MCP — curated audio-news, daily briefings, the public Declassified library (FBI/CIA/NSA/NASA/DOJ/AARO releases), and market-linked story signals. 20 free no-auth/OAuth tools + 1 premium x402 tool that pays your agent revenue share.
